violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine backplate) were observed with an accumulation of residue and other debris. PIC cleaned, and sanitized backplate of ice machine and discard 30 pounds of ice at time of inspection. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (fan covers located in walk-in cooler and mixer located in kitchen) have an accumulation of dust, and other debris. PIC cleaned fan covers and non-food contact areas of mixer at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

The floor underneath stove in the (kitchen) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. PIC cleaned floor at time of inspection. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC relocated can opener to warewashing area to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Observed the ceiling located in the kitchen area in poor repair. Per PIC facility is currently redoing ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025

Observed stained ceiling tiles in both kitchenette areas and ceilings are not covered with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceilings tiles must be covered with smooth, durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent material. Per PIC ceilings in both kitchenettes will be changed within 6 months. Proper materials for ceilings were provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2025
The walk-in cooler floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Milk was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) Gaskets of refrigeration units frayed 2) Refrigeration unit on first floor not holding adequate ambient temperature. PIC instructed not to use refrigeration unit to store TCS foods until service is provided New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the ware-washing area have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The plumbing near the three bay sink was in poor repair (active leak observed at time of inspection). New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The floor of the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
